mapper.select: SELECT id, title, mode, start_name, start_lng, start_lat, end_name, end_lng, end_lat, via_json, distance, duration, created_at, updated_at FROM route_history WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO route_history ( title, mode, start_name, start_lng, start_lat, end_name, end_lng, end_lat, via_json, distance, duration, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{mode}, #{startName}, #{startLng}, #{startLat}, #{endName}, #{endLng}, #{endLat}, #{viaJson}, #{distance}, #{duration}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE route_history SET title = #{title}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
